metadata.title: China EV Wallbox (V2H/V2G) Supplier Shortlist
metadata.description: Chinese manufacturers of bidirectional V2H/V2G AC wallbox EV chargers in the 7-22 kW range, OCPP-compliant. Reference benchmark is iocharger (Xiamen Galaxy Camphol Technology) — OMITTED from outbound list as that is the product being benchmarked.

search_criteria.target_product: OCPP 2.0.1 V2H/V2G AC Wallbox, 7 kW, Type 2 / Type 1
search_criteria.reference_brand: iocharger (Xiamen Galaxy Camphol Technology Co., Ltd.) — NOT CONTACTED

email_verification_notes.action_required: Review inferred emails before dispatch; verify bounce-back behavior on first send.

companies.name_cn: 深圳英飞源技术有限公司
companies.email_notes: Domain @infypower.com confirmed via ZoomInfo / company website. Generic alias inferred; verify on first send.
companies.address: 1st Floor, No. 1, Linoya Industrial Park, Tangtou No.1 Road, Shiyan Street, Bao'an District, Shenzhen, Guangdong 518108, China
companies.product_summary: Single-phase 7 kW V2H/V2G bidirectional wallbox (CCS1/CCS2/CHAdeMO/GB-T); three-phase 11/22 kW bidirectional; also 176 kW DC bidirectional for commercial.
companies.ocpp_version_claimed: OCPP universal (version unspecified on listing — confirm 2.0.1 support)
companies.notes: Diamond Member on Made-in-China since 2022. Established 2014. Strong OEM/ODM track record. V2H/V2G confirmed at 7 kW.

companies.name_en: Wuhan Fiberhome Fuhua Electric Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 武汉烽火富华电气有限责任公司
companies.email_notes: Domain @ffepower.com.cn confirmed via ZoomInfo (multiple employees). Generic alias inferred; verify on first send.
companies.product_summary: 7 kW V2H/V2G bidirectional wallbox (Type 1/Type 2), also three-phase 400 VAC 7-22 kW residential models. Broader portfolio: inverters, portable power stations, ESS, UPS.
companies.notes: Part of Fiberhome group (smart-energy arm). Established 2008. Explicitly sells 7 kW V2H/V2G wallbox — good direct match. OCPP 2.0.1 support needs confirmation.

companies.name_cn: 厦门益盛科技有限公司
companies.email_notes: Listed on company profile (TradeWheel / BIMworx / jobs listings). Yahoo address is unusual but corroborated across sources.
companies.address: Unit 802, No. 10 Duiying Road, Jimei District, Xiamen City, Fujian, China
companies.product_summary: 7/11/22 kW V2G/V2H bidirectional wallbox (Type 2 AC) with V2L support; also bidirectional power module / PCS for OEM integrators.
companies.notes: Xiamen-based (same city as reference vendor iocharger). R&D focus on bidirectional DC-DC + inverter modules; sells wallbox-form factors and bare power modules for OEM integrators.

companies.name_en: Guangzhou Max Power New Energy Technology Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 广州迈科斯新能源科技有限公司
companies.email_notes: Listed directly on company contact page.
companies.address: No.5, Nanjiang 2nd Road, Nansha District, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China
companies.product_summary: Dedicated OEM/ODM V2G EV charger supplier. Portable AC chargers (Type 1/Type 2 Level 2) and DC fast chargers in FC/HC series.
companies.ocpp_version_claimed: OCPP supported (version unspecified on landing page — confirm)
companies.notes: Founded 2017. Positioned explicitly as OEM/ODM partner — useful if GO Corporation wants private-label. Nansha HQ is convenient for Bangkok shipments via Guangzhou port.

companies.name_cn: 泰盛能源科技有限公司
companies.email_notes: Listed directly on company contact page.
companies.product_summary: Bidirectional V2G EV chargers including 60 kW DC Level 3 with full OCPP 1.6J and OCPP 2.0.1 support and Plug&Charge upgradable. Also AC Type 2 wallbox range 7/11/22 kW.
companies.notes: Exports to 50+ countries across EU/NA/Asia/Oceania. Only vendor in shortlist with explicit OCPP 2.0.1 + Plug&Charge upgradable on a bidirectional product. Strongest technical fit.

companies.name_en: Sichuan Green Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 四川绿能科技有限公司
companies.email_notes: Listed directly on company V2G product page.
companies.address: Room 401, Block B, Building 11, Lide Times, No. 17, Wuxing 2nd Road, Chengdu, Sichuan, China
companies.product_summary: AC wallbox range 7/11/22 kW and DC charger range 40/60/120/160 kW. V2G product category listed but specific V2H/V2G wallbox SKU to confirm.
companies.notes: V2G V2H category listed on site; explicit bidirectional wallbox SKU and OCPP 2.0.1 support need confirmation in RFQ response. Broad AC + DC portfolio.

companies.name_en: Wenzhou Xinchi International Trade Co., Ltd. (China Suntree)
companies.name_cn: 温州星驰国际贸易有限公司（中国松树）
companies.email_notes: Listed directly on company contact page.
companies.address: No.3 Siqian Road, Xinguang Industrial Park, Liushi Town, Yueqing City, Wenzhou, Zhejiang, China
companies.product_summary: AC wallbox 7/11/22 kW (Type 2, GB/T), also PV / energy storage systems. Current EV range is primarily unidirectional AC; V2H/V2G capability to confirm.
companies.ocpp_version_claimed: OCPP 1.6J (confirm if V2H/V2G or OCPP 2.0.1 roadmap exists)
companies.notes: Included as a control: strong AC wallbox range + solid certifications but V2H/V2G and OCPP 2.0.1 support is uncertain from public materials. RFQ response will clarify whether they compete in V2H/V2G or are unidirectional-only.
